name: Scraper_App
description: Multi-source scraper: Google Maps, LinkedIn, BestJobs

scripts.scrape:all: playwright test tests/maps_scraper.spec.ts && playwright test tests/linkedin_scraper.spec.ts && playwright test tests/bestjobs_scraper.spec.ts && playwright test tests/ejobs_scraper.spec.ts && playwright test tests/hipo_scraper.spec.ts
scripts.scrape: npm run scrape:all && npm run merge
